name: kelta-platform
description: Multi-tenant enterprise platform with configurable objects and workflows

scripts.setup: cd kelta-web && npm install && cd ../kelta-ui/app && npm install && cd ../../e2e-tests && npm install
scripts.build: cd kelta-web && npm run build && cd ../kelta-ui/app && npm run build
scripts.test: cd kelta-web && npm test && cd ../kelta-ui/app && npm test
scripts.test:java: mvn verify -f kelta-gateway/pom.xml -B && mvn verify -f kelta-worker/pom.xml -B
scripts.lint: cd kelta-web && npm run lint && cd ../kelta-ui/app && npm run lint
scripts.format: cd kelta-web && npm run format && cd ../kelta-ui/app && npm run format
scripts.format:check: cd kelta-web && npm run format:check && cd ../kelta-ui/app && npm run format:check
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
